notes: Frontend campaign versioning, test-first. (1) Edits write the DRAFT via PUT /campaigns/:id/draft for every persist (node save/insert/delete/move/duplicate/trigger-segment); new campaign first persist still POSTs. draft-indicator from pure draftDiffersFrom (canonical-JSON) in versioning.ts (+ backfillAllowed). (2) publish-version opens a STYLED modal (publish-modal) with required version-name + publish-scope (forward/backfill radios only when backfillAllowed else forward-only hint); publish-confirm -> POST publish; 400/409 gate inline (publish-reason) + node-publish-error, modal stays open on failure; success toasts (enrolled count on backfill), reload, status active. (3) History tab (campaign-tab-builder/-history) lists version-row newest-first with version-active badge + version-revert -> askConfirm -> POST revert -> loads draft into builder + toast. (4) Edit-header campaign-pause/-resume kept alongside list-row. BACKEND FOLLOW-UP: attachCampaignSendTemplate made DRAFT-AWARE (draft_definition ?? definition, writes back to draft when one exists else live) - a template-less draft used to shadow a live-only attach and drop the email, blocking publish; backward-compatible. SPEC UPDATES: publishCampaign(page,name) helper; gate/lifecycle/journey-smoke publish via the modal; journey-smoke STALE update-key/value testids fixed to assignment-key/assignment-literal. Version NOT bumped (backend set 0.40.0). NOT committed/pushed.
